title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXC. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Love your own, kiss your own.
            Love your own mother, hinny,
        For if she was dead and gone,
            You'd ne'er get such another, hinny.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXC. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
